name: Video Translator
description: Upload a video, automatically transcribe → translate subtitles → synthesize new voice-over → output a bilingual video. Self-contained: uses contrib.asr / contrib.tts directly (no sibling-plugin imports).

description_i18n.zh: 上传一段视频，自动识别语音 → 翻译字幕 → 合成新配音 → 输出双语视频。直接走 SDK contrib.asr / contrib.tts，不再硬依赖其他插件。
description_i18n.en: Upload a video, automatically transcribe → translate subtitles → synthesize new voice-over → output a bilingual video. Self-contained: uses contrib.asr / contrib.tts directly (no sibling-plugin imports).

author: OpenAkita
